name: TestJoinLinTransmErrorEvent
title: TestJoinLinTransmErrorEvent
description: Completes the current set of "joined events" with the transmitted event. This function does not wait.
Consider to set always the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment before the function is called.
Further information on site MultiBus Environment.

parameters.name: aFrameId
parameters.description: Numeric ID of a frame whose Transmission Error should be awaited.
